hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Main.general_idea: Register additional entity classes (Laptop, Passport, ClassRoom) in the Hibernate configuration to support new domain models.
Add logic to create and persist Laptop entities before creating the Student to handle relationship constraints.
Add logic to create and persist a Passport entity to be associated with the Student.
Add logic to create and persist a ClassRoom entity using a builder pattern.
Replace direct constructor invocation with a builder pattern for Student creation to support new fields and relationships.
Implement a read operation to fetch the persisted student from the database and verify data integrity.
Implement an update operation to modify the student's name and merge changes back to the database.
Implement a delete operation structure, though the actual removal call is commented out.
Ensure Hibernate Session and SessionFactory are closed to prevent resource leaks.
Wrap persistence operations in try-catch blocks to handle potential exceptions gracefully.

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Replace manual getters, setters, and constructors with Lombok @Data, @AllArgsConstructor, @NoArgsConstructor, and @Builder annotations to reduce boilerplate.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.human_impl: Added @Data, @AllArgsConstructor, @NoArgsConstructor, @Builder and removed explicit constructor and getter/setter methods.

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Add @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY) to the ID field to enable automatic primary key generation.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.human_impl: Added @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY) above private long id;

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Add a OneToOne relationship field for Passport to the Student entity.
Add a OneToMany relationship field for a list of Laptops to the Student entity.
Add a ManyToMany relationship field for a list of ClassRooms to the Student entity.

hibernate/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Project Lombok as a compile-time dependency to reduce boilerplate code.

hibernate/src/main/resources/hibernate.c.general_idea: Switched Hibernate schema generation from update to create to ensure a fresh database schema on startup.
Enabled SQL statement logging to stdout for debugging purposes.
Enabled pretty-printing of SQL statements in logs for better readability.
Explicitly configured the PostgreSQL dialect to ensure correct SQL generation.

hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.general_idea: Switch Hibernate schema generation from update to create to reset the database schema on startup.
Enable SQL statement logging for debugging purposes.
Enable formatted SQL output for better readability in logs.
Explicitly set the PostgreSQL dialect for Hibernate.
